title: abrotanella rostrata
intro: Abrotanella rostrata is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand, belonging to the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Abrotanella rostrata include reducing inflammation and soothing skin irritations, as well as treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Abrotanella rostrata include infusions, tinctures, and poultices, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
